values.description: Azure Active Directory tenant ID used for OAuth2 authentication.
Azure subscription ID that contains the NetApp resources.
Azure AD application (client) ID used for service principal authentication.
Azure AD application client secret used for service principal authentication.
Name of the Azure resource group that contains the NetApp resources.
Name of the Azure NetApp Files account.
Azure region where the NetApp account and resources are deployed (e.g., eastus, westeurope).
Name of the capacity pool within the NetApp account.
Performance service level of the capacity pool and volume (Standard, Premium, or Ultra).
Maximum throughput in MiB/s allowed for the volume.  Only needed for Flexible Service Level or Manual QoS
Azure Resource ID of the delegated subnet used to host the volume.
Maximum storage quota (in bytes) allowed for the volume.
Set of protocols used by the volume (e.g., NFSv3, NFSv4.1, CIFS).
Hostname or IP address of the external (on-premises) ONTAP cluster host for migration replication (remotePath.externalHostName).
SVM (Storage Virtual Machine) name on the external ONTAP cluster for migration replication (remotePath.serverName).
Name of the source volume on the external ONTAP cluster to be migrated (remotePath.volumeName).
List of intercluster IP addresses of the external ONTAP cluster used for cluster peering.
Azure async operation ID returned from long-running migration operations, used to poll for completion status.
Replication schedule for the migration volume. Allowed values: _10minutely, hourly, daily (replicationSchedule).
Azure AD OAuth2 token endpoint URL used to obtain bearer tokens (e.g., https://login.microsoftonline.com/{{tenant}}/oauth2/token).
Base URL for the Azure NetApp Files REST API (e.g., https://management.azure.com).
Azure NetApp Files REST API version to use in all requests (e.g., 2025-07-01).
